title: Approve a safe refactor after checking the right evidence
objective: Review the pull request and decide whether it should be approved or rejected.

pull_request.title: Refactor formatter helpers and refresh inline docs
pull_request.author: devon
pull_request.description: This PR extracts duplicated formatting logic, renames a helper for clarity, and updates the usage notes. No product behavior should change.
pull_request.summary: A low-risk refactor touching formatting helpers and documentation. The intended outcome is approval after a quick but structured review.

changed_files.summary: Moves duplicate string normalization into a shared helper.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -12,10 +12,16 @@
-def format_currency(value):
-    normalized = str(value).strip()
-    return normalized.replace("USD", "$")
+def normalize_currency_label(value):
+    normalized = str(value).strip()
+    return normalized.replace("USD", "$")
+
+def format_currency(value):
+    return normalize_currency_label(value)

changed_files.summary: Updates the formatter usage guide to match the helper rename.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -3,6 +3,6 @@
-Call format_currency(value) directly.
+Call format_currency(value) directly; internals now reuse normalize_currency_label().

policy_text: Approve refactors when tests pass and no blocker findings are present.
Avoid blocking comments for naming or style-only cleanups unless behavior changes.

findings.title: Documentation is consistent with the rename
findings.description: The docs update matches the helper rename and does not introduce risk.

static_analysis.summary: Static analysis completed successfully with no actionable findings.

test_results.summary: All 14 unit and lint checks passed.

ai_review.summary: AI reviewer found no regressions and recommends approval after confirming tests.
